base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of white_mage_white_wizard — a character from 1987 final fantasy. White Mage + White Wizard — red-cross robed healer. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
